keyRules: Maximum 120 m above ground level (EASA Open category)
Registration as a UAS operator (~€3) for drones of 250 g+ or with a camera
Mandatory A1/A3 online training — minimum age 16
Mandatory third-party liability insurance — minimum coverage €1,000,000
Banned in national parks: Plitvice Lakes, Krka, Paklenica — drone flying is not permitted
Always maintain visual contact with the drone (VLOS)
Never fly over people, crowds or public events
At least 5 km from any airport or airfield
Night flying prohibited without special authorisation
Coastal areas during summer: additional restrictions possible
importantNotes: National parks (Plitvice, Krka, Paklenica) strictly prohibit all drones
Mandatory insurance with minimum coverage of €1,000,000
Registration is very affordable (~€3) and valid across the entire EU
Dubrovnik old town: expect drone restrictions
GDPR applies when filming identifiable people

fields.disclaimerText: Always check the official CCAA sources and the AMC Portal before flying. This app is a tool — not a legal authority. Croatia follows EASA regulations with national additions, including bans in national parks.
